ItacPersonItem.Notes: Lector of Logic and professor of Philosophy, and then Medicine. Hosted the Coro anatomico for a short while, after Massari`s death in 1655. See his biography by R. De Tata, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
